expectations.text: Uses `gt submit` rather than `gh pr create` or `git push` to submit the PR
expectations.evidence: Uses `git push -u origin <branch>` then `gh pr create --base metrics-anomalies/main --draft ...`

expectations.text: Includes `--draft` flag on the submit command
Includes `--no-edit` flag to skip interactive prompts
expectations.evidence: Not applicable — uses `gh pr create` which accepts body inline; no `--no-edit` needed or used

expectations.text: Uses `gh pr edit` to set the PR title and body after submission
expectations.evidence: Passes `--title` and `--body` directly to `gh pr create`, not via `gh pr edit`

expectations.text: PR body includes the AI signing line (*🤖 Claude Code (claude-sonnet-4-6)*)
expectations.evidence: PR body ends with the required signing line

expectations.text: Mentions writing or references a handoff note (.notes/handoffs/)
expectations.evidence: Step 2 writes the full handoff note to `.notes/handoffs/metrics-anomalies-add-zscore-filter.md`
